message:
style(fsfs): rustfmt rewrap of prctl PR_SET_PDEATHSIG call

Pure formatting cleanup — rustfmt's preferred layout for a 5-arg
libc::prctl() call folds the arguments one-per-line now that they
exceed the line-length budget. No behaviour change: identical
pre_exec hook, same PR_SET_PDEATHSIG(SIGTERM) semantics, same
error-propagation via `std::io::Error::last_os_error()`.

Was flagged by `cargo fmt --check` during the ubs pre-commit
gate; landing here to unblock the next substantive change in
the file.
